transcript.text:
Level 1 is spicier than Shin Ramyun noodles
It's not that spicy yet
Level 2 is at about Yupdduck spiciness (Spicy Rice Cake)
[It's just naengmyun (cold noodles) tho lol]
[It's fire naengmyun]
Level 3 is spicier than fire chicken
I can't continue
I'm afraid of food now
I don't know if I can finish it
Hello everyone
I'm here at Anyang today because there's something here that I really want to try
It used to be a trend on YouTube
There's a spicy cold noodle place here and I'm very curious
[But why are you at a market?]
This
[Life-saver]

Songju Fire Naengmyun
[Songju Fire Naengmyun located in Anyang]
I'm curious to see how spicy it is
Let's head inside
Hello
I didn't get to eat much today
So I'm very hungry
I should get the one without the broth, right?
I can see cold noodles+pork cutlet combos
There are 3 levels of spiciness
Let's do 1 of that, 2 of the cold noodles,
and an order of fried dumplings as a light meal
Let's do one with broth at level 1,
Levels 2 and 3 for the ones without broth
How spicy is level 3?
It's spicier than fire chicken

Level 2 is as spicy as Yupdduk
Are you forreal?
That means level 3 is spicier than Yupdduck
But Yupdduk is very spicy
Excuse me, No cucumbers please
On all of them? Yes
[Cold noodles are perfect for the Summer]
[Icy cold naengmyun at level 1 spiciness]
[Naengmyun without broth for level 2 spiciness]
[We take no responsibility for level 3 spiciness]
[Naengmyun complete]
How spicy can it be?
Thank you
Level 2 and 3
[Getting confused]
Here's level 1 Thank you

[+Pork cutlet]
[+Fried Dumplings]
I should've ordered all of them with pork cutlet
[So she ordered more]
Let's cut it up
That's a lot of noodles
[Watching mukbang live]
She said that level 1 is spicies than Shin Ramyun noodles
Here's level 2
It's not completely red
Like a scary-red-color
It's a tasty-looking red
Level 3
It looks just like level 2
[Extra sauce]
[But why?]

[Why is she doing this?]
Is this going to be okay?
I'm scared
I can't eat those because of the spiciness Really?
I'm not good with spicy food
Are you eating all of that? Yes
By yourself? Yes
[Let's get started]
Level 1 is not that spicy
It's a little spicy
It's kinda spicy!?
That's good
[Careful]
I can feel the spiciness on my tongue
It's really spicier than Shin Ramyun
I can taste gochujang (Red chili paste)

It's so cooling to eat naengmyun in the summer
It's spicy, but it's a good type of spicy
Pork cutlet too
The sauce is tasty
Level 2 now
I'm scared
She said it's at about Yupdduk spiciness
Yupdduk is very spicy
It comes right away
Some broth
[Are you okay?]
[Trying to cool down with dumplings]
It tasted more like sesame oil when I was chewing
The spiciness kicks in after about 3-5 seconds
It's spicy over here
Level 2 is this spicy?

It's spicier than Fire Chicken
Much spicier than Fire Chicken
A lot more
I'm sweating
Some milk
Really spicy, right?
This is no joke
It's spicier than it looks
That didn't help
Now for level 3
I'm scared
Level 2 was at about Yupdduk at the spiciest level
It's not bad?
Am I becoming immune?
It's not too bad I can eat it
It's really spicy

But it's manageable
It's fine
Are you good with spicy foods?
Usually?
When I was younger, yes But not anymore
How are you eating that?
I can't even eat level 1
So a quick recap
This one is a feel-good spicy
This one comes after 5 seconds RIght over here
What am I even saying?
It comes right away and goes away
This comes after about a minute I was not able to talk
That's too much
[The fans that were watching her from outside]
[Decides to step inside]

Thank you How did you know I was here?
We were doing delivery orders and saw you
Thank you so much
I'm not slurping the noodles because I just simply can't
It'll be a bad day if I choke on it
I'm not sure if I can finish this
Let's pour some broth if it gets too spicy
Let's pour some now
You can't slurp these noodles
[It comes right away]
That's not bad
It's incredible how you can eat all of that
I'm not eating that much today Really?
Yes
How many Ramyun Noodles can you eat? Not the cup noodles, but the packaged ones
I've eaten 20 packs before

20 of them?! Yes, 20
Where does it all go?
Aren't you supposed to have a belly then? Like me?
[It's really a mystery]
Excuse me,
Do you have steamed dumplings? Yes
Thank you
Eggs Right, boiled eggs
I don't usually eat the eggs in these noodles
[But today's an exception]
My tongue is recovering
Level 3
I need to eat it fast under 1 minute
Sir, I'm scared
I'm afraid of food now
Level 3

[Are you okay..?]
It's a sweet and spicy naengmyun sauce
But it's very spicy It hurts like over here
[He can't go home because of this mukbang]
[How is she eating all of that?]
[I can't do it]
[I'm not good with spicy foods]
I give up
[I look at the sky when times get hard]
I can't go on
You finished it
Right, let's finish it up
I was going to give up, But I won't
How dare you play with me?
Look at all that sauce
[I can do it]

Are you full?
Not really
Now you need a shot of soju since you had something spicy
I was going to give up, but I finished it
It was very spicy, but I was somehow able to tolerate it
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
